FGO_STATIC_HOVER_TIPS_NP.title: NP
FGO_STATIC_HOVER_TIPS_NP.description: Noble Phantasm gauge. At 100%+, you can use your Noble Phantasm.
FGO_STATIC_HOVER_TIPS_STAR.title: Critical Stars
FGO_STATIC_HOVER_TIPS_STAR.description: At 10+ stars, your next attack deals double damage and consumes 10 stars.
FGO_STATIC_HOVER_TIPS_NP_DAMAGE.title: NP Damage
FGO_STATIC_HOVER_TIPS_NP_DAMAGE.descript: Increases NP attack damage by this percentage.
FGO_STATIC_HOVER_TIPS_CRITICAL_DAMAGE.de: Increases critical hit damage by this percentage.
FGO_STATIC_HOVER_TIPS_EVIL_CURSE.title: Evil Curse
FGO_STATIC_HOVER_TIPS_EVIL_CURSE.descrip: At the start of turn, lose HP equal to curse stacks.
FGO_STATIC_HOVER_TIPS_COMMAND_SPELL.desc:
[gold]Noble[/gold] Phantasm Release[gold]:[/gold] Gain 100% [gold]Noble[/gold] Phantasm Gauge[gold].[/gold]
Activated by using 1 [gold]Command[/gold] Spell[gold].[/gold]

[gold]Spiritron[/gold] Repair[gold]:[/gold] Restore 30 HP.
Activated by using 1 [gold]Command[/gold] Spell[gold].[/gold]

[gold]Spiritron[/gold] Restoration[gold]:[/gold] Survive fatal damage and restore all HP.
Gain 300% [gold]Noble[/gold] Phantasm Gauge[gold].[/gold]
Activates when you are about to be defeated, consuming 3 [gold]Command[/gold] Spells[gold].[/gold]
